titleStmt.title: SII 9.170: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 170. (A.R. No. 28 of 1904.) ON A SLAB SET UP IN FRONT OF THE KALLESVARA TEMPLE AT AMBALI, KUDLIGI TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Chālukya-Vikrama year 30, Pārthiva, Pushya, amāvāsye, Sōmavāra, Uttarāyaṇa-saṅkrānti, Vyatīpāta. The date is irregular. By the tithi the equivalent would be A.D. 1106 January 7 Sunday, not Monday, as stated, Uttarāyaṇa 14. It refers itself to the reign of the Chāḷukya king Tribhuvanamalladēva. Under the orders of Aṇukapallavarāya-Daṇḍanāyaka, an officer in charge of the toll-revenue, the Heggaḍes of toll-revenue viz., Kēśirāja and Kāḷimarasa are stated to have made a grant of a part of the toll-revenue to the Mahājanas of Ammeḷe for repairs to the tank Hiriyakeṟe, confirming the grant formerly made for the purpose, besides giving some land, free of taxes.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē trailōkyanagarāraṁbha(ṁ)
mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . viśuddha(ṁ)jñānadēhāya trivēdīdivyaca
kṣuṣē . śrēyaḥprāptinimittāya namassōmārdhdhadhāriṇē .
svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīprithvīvallabha mahārājādhirā
ja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭāraka satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābha
raṇaṁ śrīmattribhuvanamalladēvara vijayarājyamuttarōttarā
bhivriddhipravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttuṁkalyā
ṇapurada nelevīḍinoḷu sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁge
yyuttamire tatpādapadmōpajīvi samastapraśastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahā
maṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ tribhuvanamallapāṁḍyadēvaru noṇaṁbavāḍi mūvattircchāsiramu
ṟuvina nelevīḍinoḷsukhasaṁkathāvinōdadoḷire samastapra
śrīmanmahāmaṁḍaḷēśvara ghaṭṭidēvarasaru koṭṭūroḷu su
maccāḷukyavikramavarṣada 30 neya pārtthivasaṁvatsarada puśya
sye sōmavāra Uttarāyaṇasaṁkrānti vyatīpātaṁ kūḍidaṁdu
śrīmanmahāpradhāna noṇaṁbavāḍi mūvattircchāsirada vaḍḍarāvuḷa he
rjjuṁkadadhiṣṭhāyakanaṇukapallavarāyadaṁḍanāyakara be
sadiṁ dēvara suṁkadaheggaḍe kēsirājanuṁ kāḷimarasa
nuṁ śrīmadammeḷeyūroḍeya mahājanavayvadiṁba
kālaṁ karcci dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi hiriyakeṟeya
meygelasavaṁ naḍeyisuvantāgi tamma pannāyadeleya hēṟina
vaḍḍarāvuḷa herjjuṁkaṁ hēṟiṁge paṇavaydaṟoḷage hē
ṟiṁge hāgavondaṟa lekkadalu biṭṭaru pūrvvadalā keṟege naḍavantappa
kuḷiyasuṁka Eleya hēṟiṁge hāgaveraḍu vīsavondu Aḍakeyā
yaṁ poṁge hāga vondara lekka kārapuṇnamiyalu gelvettina sēse ga
dyāṇa vondu mēdarallidabbaṇigedeṟeya nōḍikoṁbaru beḷḷaka
ṭṭeya kōḍiya gaṟde mattarondu Ūra gaṟdegellaṁ bittuvaṭṭaṁ nūṟu
kammakke koḷagavaydaṟa lekka Ā keṟeya mūḍaṇa kōḍiye
reya kai mattaru hanneraḍu Intī dharmmamaṁ tappade pratipāḷi
sidavargge śrīgaṁgādēviya vāraṇāsiya kurukṣētrada sthāna
dalli sāyira kavileya kōḍuṁ koḷugumaṁ suvarṇnadalu
kaṭṭisi caturvvēdapāragarappa sabrāhmaṇargge koṭṭa phaḷamakku .
Intī dharmmamanaḷidavarā brāhmaṇarumanā paśuvu
manā tīrtthaṁgaḷa taḍiyalu konda mahāpātakadōśamane
yduvaru . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēti vasundharāṁ ṣa
ṣṭhirvvarṣasahaśrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē kṛmiḥ .
śrīkalidēvasvāmidēvara keyyiṁ mūḍa hattire satrakke Ayva
diṁbaru mahājanaṁgaḷu dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi kōgaḷiya gaḍiṁbada
lu biṭṭa mattaru Aydu . mattamā puṇyatithiyalu Aṇukapallava
daṁḍanāyakaṁ śrīsvayaṁbhukalidēvasvāmiya vīḷeyakke dēvara tōṁṭa
deleyaḍakeya suṁkamaṁ sarvanamaśyamāgi biṭṭaru .
Digital edition of SII 9.170 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
